Estimator or Update Method: Robust moving estimate or state-space filter
Rollback Condition: Missingness or residual exceeds approved threshold
Provenance Record: Source timestamp schema version and aggregation rule

Update Frequency: Per shift or detected status change
Admissible Bounds: Positive and within certified physical capacity
Rollback Condition: Abrupt unsupported change or infeasible prediction
Provenance Record: Sensor/log identifiers estimator version and confidence

Data Source: Inventory receipts; stock counts; budget postings
Admissible Bounds: Nonnegative; bounded by storage or budget
Provenance Record: Transaction IDs correction history and approver

Data Source: Approved service level; policy commitment; stakeholder agreement
Admissible Bounds: Positive and within feasible planning range
Rollback Condition: No stakeholder approval or feasibility failure
Provenance Record: Decision minutes rationale effective date and version

Data Source: Invoices; prices; subsidies; audited outcome valuation
Admissible Bounds: Plausible domain range with sign restrictions
Rollback Condition: Audit mismatch or sensitivity changes conclusions materially
Provenance Record: Data period estimator diagnostics and approval

Data Source: Delay; outage; policy event; supply alert
Provenance Record: Event sources classifier version and confidence

Data Source: Recommendation; response; veto reason; executed action
Rollback Condition: Consent failure subgroup harm or severe miscalibration
Provenance Record: Pseudonymous event model version and consent basis

Data Source: Shadow-mode outcomes; constraint and fairness metrics
